title: DeFi Security 101 2025 - Web3 Operational Security 101
description:
DeFi Security 101 is a one-day intensive course specifically designed for builders who wish to deepen their understanding of web3 security.

This session was led by pablito.eth, founder of Opsek.

DSS 101 2025 took place in Buenos Aires, Argentina, during Devconnect week, as part of the 4th edition of the DeFi Security Summit (DSS).

Learn more about the program: https://luma.com/8kje8uh3
